salmanshh_statforge.name: StatForge
salmanshh_statforge.description: A layered buff and debuff system. Attach to any object to give it named stats that can be boosted, reduced, timed, or chained together using a stack of modifiers.

autoTickTimers.name: Auto-tick timers
autoTickTimers.desc: Automatically counts down temporary buff timers every frame. Disable if you want to advance timers manually.

overflowMode.name: Overflow mode
overflowMode.desc: What happens when a stat total goes outside the Min/Max range. Clamp = stop at the boundary. Wrap = loop around. None = no limit.

minValue.name: Min value
minValue.desc: The lowest a stat total can go when Overflow mode is Clamp or Wrap.

maxValue.name: Max value
maxValue.desc: The highest a stat total can go when Overflow mode is Clamp or Wrap.

debugMode.name: Debug mode
debugMode.desc: Logs every buff change, link fire, and threshold trigger to the browser console. Turn off before releasing.

SetBuffActive.description: Enables or disables a buff without removing it. Disabled buffs stay in the stack but do not contribute to stat totals.

active.name: Active
active.desc: True to enable the buff, false to disable it.

SetBuffsActiveByTag.description: Enables or disables every buff that has the given tag. Useful for suppressing an entire group of buffs at once.

active.name: Active
active.desc: True to enable, false to disable.

SetBuffsActiveByTags.description: Enables or disables buffs matching a tag list. 'Any' affects buffs with at least one matching tag. 'All' only affects buffs that have every tag listed.

tags.name: Tags
tags.desc: Comma-separated list of tags to match.

matchMode.name: Match mode
matchMode.desc: Any = at least one tag matches. All = every tag must match.

active.name: Active
active.desc: True to enable, false to disable.

ToggleBuffActive.description: Flips a buff between enabled and disabled. If it was on it turns off, and vice versa.

AddBuffLink.description: Creates a reactive link between two buffs. When the source buff has a certain event (e.g. it expires), an action is automatically performed on the target buff. Useful for chains like 'when shield expires, remove armour bonus'.

linkId.name: Link ID
linkId.desc: A unique name for this link.

sourceBuffId.name: Source buff
sourceBuffId.desc: The buff that triggers the link.

sourceEvent.name: Trigger event
sourceEvent.desc: Which event on the source buff fires the link. Removed = buff removed. Expired = timer ran out. Activated = buff enabled. Deactivated = buff disabled.

targetBuffId.name: Target buff
targetBuffId.desc: The buff that receives the action.

targetAction.name: Target action
targetAction.desc: What to do to the target buff when the link fires.

AddBuffLinkFromJson.description: Registers a buff link from a JSON string. See the documentation for the buff link definition format.

json.name: JSON string
json.desc: A JSON object describing the link.

ClearAllLinks.description: Removes all registered buff links. The buff stack is not affected.

RemoveAllLinksForBuff.list-name: Remove all links for a buff
RemoveAllLinksForBuff.description: Removes every link where the given buff is either the trigger (source) or the target. Call this before removing a buff that has links to avoid ghost references.

buffId.name: Buff ID
buffId.desc: The buff whose links to remove.

RemoveBuffLink.description: Removes a specific buff link by its ID. The buffs it connected are not affected.

linkId.name: Link ID
linkId.desc: The ID of the link to remove.

AddBuff.display-text: Add buff {0} to stat {1} with value {2} and tags {3}
AddBuff.description: Adds a permanent buff to the object. If a buff with the same ID already exists it will be replaced. Use tags to group buffs together for easy removal later.

buffId.name: Buff ID
buffId.desc: A unique name for this buff, e.g. "sword_bonus".

stat.name: Stat
stat.desc: The stat this buff changes, e.g. "attack" or "speed".

value.name: Value
value.desc: How much to add to the stat. Use negative values for debuffs.

tags.name: Tags
tags.desc: Comma-separated labels for grouping, e.g. "fire,buff". Use "" for none.

AddBuffFromJson.description: Registers a buff from a JSON string. Useful for loading buffs from files or variables. The JSON must follow the buff definition format from the documentation.

json.name: JSON string
json.desc: A JSON object describing the buff. Must include at least "id", "stat", and "value".

AddBuffFull.display-text: Add buff {0} to stat {1} value {2} mode {3} tags {4} source {5}
AddBuffFull.description: Adds a permanent buff with full control over all options in a single action. The source lets you label who created this buff so you can remove it all at once later (e.g. when an item is unequipped).

buffId.name: Buff ID
buffId.desc: A unique name for this buff.

mode.name: Stacking mode
mode.desc: Add = flat bonus. Multiply = percentage bonus. Override = replaces total if highest.

source.name: Source
source.desc: Label for who created this buff, e.g. "sword_of_fire". Use "" for none.

AddBuffWithMode.display-text: Add buff {0} to stat {1} value {2} mode {3} tags {4}
AddBuffWithMode.description: Adds a permanent buff and lets you choose how it stacks with other buffs on the same stat. Add = flat bonus, Multiply = percentage bonus, Override = force to a specific value.

buffId.name: Buff ID
buffId.desc: A unique name for this buff.

mode.name: Stacking mode
mode.desc: Add = flat bonus summed with others. Multiply = percentage bonus (value of 20 means +20%). Override = replaces the stat total if it is the highest override.

tags.name: Tags
tags.desc: Comma-separated group labels. Use "" for none.

AddDebuff.display-text: Add debuff {0} to stat {1} with value {2} and tags {3}
AddDebuff.description: Adds a permanent debuff to the object. Automatically includes the 'debuff' tag so you can cleanse all debuffs at once. Any extra tags you supply are added alongside it.

buffId.name: Buff ID
buffId.desc: A unique name for this debuff, e.g. "weakness".

stat.name: Stat
stat.desc: The stat this debuff changes, e.g. "attack" or "speed".

value.name: Value
value.desc: How much to add to the stat. Negative values reduce the stat.

tags.name: Extra Tags
tags.desc: Additional comma-separated labels beyond 'debuff', e.g. "poison,fire". Use "" for none.

AddDebuffFull.display-text: Add debuff {0} to stat {1} value {2} mode {3} tags {4} source {5}
AddDebuffFull.description: Adds a permanent debuff with full control over stacking mode, tags, and source. Automatically includes the 'debuff' tag. The source lets you remove all debuffs from the same origin at once.

buffId.name: Buff ID
buffId.desc: A unique name for this debuff.

value.name: Value
value.desc: The modifier amount. Negative for reductions.

mode.name: Stacking mode
mode.desc: Add = flat reduction. Multiply = percentage reduction. Override = replaces total if highest.

tags.name: Extra Tags
tags.desc: Additional labels beyond 'debuff', e.g. "curse,fire". Use "" for none.

source.name: Source
source.desc: Who applied this debuff, e.g. "enemy_wizard". Use "" for none.

AddDebuffWithMode.display-text: Add debuff {0} to stat {1} value {2} mode {3} tags {4}
AddDebuffWithMode.description: Adds a permanent debuff with a chosen stacking mode. Automatically includes the 'debuff' tag. Use 'multiply' for percentage penalties (e.g. -30 = -30% speed) and 'override' to hard-cap a stat.

buffId.name: Buff ID
buffId.desc: A unique name for this debuff.

value.name: Value
value.desc: The modifier amount. Negative for reductions.

mode.name: Stacking mode
mode.desc: Add = flat reduction. Multiply = percentage reduction. Override = replaces total if highest.

tags.name: Extra Tags
tags.desc: Additional labels beyond 'debuff'. Use "" for none.

AddTemporaryBuff.display-text: Add timed buff {0} to stat {1} value {2} for {3} seconds tags {4}
AddTemporaryBuff.description: Adds a buff that automatically expires after the given number of seconds. Fires 'On buff expired' and 'On buff removed' when time runs out.

buffId.name: Buff ID
buffId.desc: A unique name for this buff.

duration.name: Duration (secs)
duration.desc: How many seconds before the buff expires.

tags.name: Tags
tags.desc: Comma-separated group labels. Use "" for none.

AddTemporaryBuffFull.display-text: Add timed buff {0} to stat {1} value {2} mode {3} for {4}s tags {5} source {6}
AddTemporaryBuffFull.description: Adds a timed buff with full control: stacking mode, duration, tags, and source all in one action.

buffId.name: Buff ID
buffId.desc: A unique name for this buff.

mode.name: Stacking mode
mode.desc: Add = flat bonus. Multiply = percentage bonus. Override = replaces total if highest.

duration.name: Duration (secs)
duration.desc: How many seconds before the buff expires.

source.name: Source
source.desc: Label for who created this buff. Use "" for none.

AddTemporaryDebuff.display-text: Add timed debuff {0} to stat {1} value {2} for {3} seconds tags {4}
AddTemporaryDebuff.description: Adds a debuff that automatically expires after the given number of seconds. Automatically includes the 'debuff' tag. Fires 'On buff expired' and 'On buff removed' when time runs out.

buffId.name: Buff ID
buffId.desc: A unique name for this debuff, e.g. "slow".

value.name: Value
value.desc: The modifier amount. Negative for reductions.

duration.name: Duration (secs)
duration.desc: How many seconds before the debuff expires.

tags.name: Extra Tags
tags.desc: Additional labels beyond 'debuff'. Use "" for none.

AddTemporaryDebuffFull.display-text: Add timed debuff {0} to stat {1} value {2} mode {3} for {4}s tags {5} source {6}
AddTemporaryDebuffFull.description: Adds a timed debuff with full control: stacking mode, duration, extra tags, and source all in one action. Automatically includes the 'debuff' tag.

buffId.name: Buff ID
buffId.desc: A unique name for this debuff.

value.name: Value
value.desc: The modifier amount. Negative for reductions.

mode.name: Stacking mode
mode.desc: Add = flat reduction. Multiply = percentage reduction. Override = replaces total if highest.

duration.name: Duration (secs)
duration.desc: How many seconds before the debuff expires.

tags.name: Extra Tags
tags.desc: Additional labels beyond 'debuff', e.g. "curse,fire". Use "" for none.

source.name: Source
source.desc: Who applied this debuff. Use "" for none.

ClearAllBuffs.description: Removes every buff from this object at once. Fires 'On buff removed' for each buff, then 'On stack cleared' once at the end.

LoadBuffStackFromJson.description: Loads a JSON array of buff objects and adds them all to the stack in one action. Use this in 'On start of layout' to pre-load a character's starting buffs from a variable, JSON plugin, or inline string.

json.name: JSON string
json.desc: A JSON array of buff objects, e.g. [{"id":"base_hp","stat":"hp","value":200}]. Each object supports: id, stat, value, mode, tags, source, active, temporary, duration.

RemoveBuff.description: Removes the buff with this ID. If no buff with this ID exists nothing happens.

buffId.name: Buff ID
buffId.desc: The ID of the buff to remove.

RemoveBuffsByTag.description: Removes every buff that has the given tag. Fires 'On buff removed' for each one.

tag.name: Tag
tag.desc: The tag label to match. Only buffs that have this exact tag will be removed.

RemoveBuffsByTags.description: Removes buffs that match a list of tags. 'Any' removes buffs that have at least one of the tags. 'All' removes only buffs that have every tag in the list.

tags.name: Tags
tags.desc: Comma-separated list of tags to match.

matchMode.name: Match mode
matchMode.desc: Any = buff needs at least one of the tags. All = buff must have every tag listed.

RemoveBuffsOnStat.description: Removes every buff that targets the given stat, regardless of their tags or source.

stat.name: Stat
stat.desc: The stat name to clear all buffs from.

AddBuffWithSource.display-text: Add buff {0} to stat {1} value {2} tags {3} source {4}
AddBuffWithSource.description: Adds a permanent additive buff and tags it with a source label. Use the Remove buffs by source action to strip everything this source added in one call.

buffId.name: Buff ID
buffId.desc: A unique name for this buff.

tags.name: Tags
tags.desc: Comma-separated group labels. Use "" for none.

source.name: Source
source.desc: Who created this buff, e.g. "sword_of_fire" or an object UID.

AddTemporaryBuffWithSource.display-text: Add timed buff {0} to stat {1} value {2} for {3}s tags {4} source {5}
AddTemporaryBuffWithSource.description: Adds an additive timed buff and stamps it with a source label. The buff expires after the given seconds.

buffId.name: Buff ID
buffId.desc: A unique name for this buff.

RemoveBuffsBySource.description: Removes every buff whose source matches the given label exactly. Use this when an item is unequipped or an ability ends to clean up everything it contributed in one call.

source.name: Source
source.desc: The source label to match. Must be exact.

SetBuffsActiveBySource.description: Enables or disables all buffs from a given source without removing them. Disabled buffs stay in the stack but are not counted in stat totals.

active.name: Active
active.desc: True to enable, false to disable.

SetBuffSource.description: Changes the source label on an existing buff without removing or re-adding it. Pass an empty string to clear the source.

source.name: Source
source.desc: The new source label. Use "" to remove it.

AddThresholdRule.description: Registers a rule that watches a stat and automatically fires an action on a buff when the stat crosses a threshold number. For example: 'when hit_count reaches 5, activate berserk_buff'.

ruleId.name: Rule ID
ruleId.desc: A unique name for this rule.

threshold.name: Threshold
threshold.desc: The value the stat must cross to fire the rule.

triggerMode.name: Trigger when
triggerMode.desc: Reaches = fires when stat goes from below the threshold to at or above it. Falls below = fires when stat goes from at or above back below it.

targetBuffId.name: Target buff
targetBuffId.desc: The buff that receives the action when the rule fires.

ruleAction.name: Action
ruleAction.desc: What to do to the target buff when the rule fires.

AddThresholdRuleFromJson.description: Registers a threshold rule from a JSON string. See the documentation for the threshold rule definition format.

json.name: JSON string
json.desc: A JSON object describing the threshold rule.

ArmThresholdRule.description: Re-enables a threshold rule that previously fired and was not set to repeat. The rule will fire again on the next qualifying threshold crossing.

ClearRuleAutoReset.description: Removes the auto-reset from a threshold rule. After the rule fires, the watched stat will no longer be automatically changed.

ClearThresholdRules.description: Removes all registered threshold rules at once. The buff stack is not affected.

DecrementStack.description: Decreases a stat's base value by the given amount. Fires 'On stat changed' and evaluates threshold rules.

IncrementStack.description: Increases a stat's base value by the given amount. Use this as a hit counter, combo counter, or charge counter. Fires 'On stat changed' and evaluates any threshold rules watching this stat.

statId.name: Stat / Counter
statId.desc: The stat name to increment, e.g. "combo" or "hit_count".

amount.name: Amount
amount.desc: How much to add to the counter.

RemoveThresholdRule.description: Removes a threshold rule so it will no longer fire.

ResetStack.description: Sets a stat's base value back to 0. Fires 'On stat changed' and evaluates threshold rules. Use this to reset a combo or hit count after the threshold fires.

SetRuleAutoReset.display-text: After rule {0} fires, reset its stat to {1}
SetRuleAutoReset.description: After the threshold rule fires, automatically resets the watched stat's base value to the given number. Set to 0 for the classic 'every 5 hits' combo reset pattern.

resetValue.name: Reset value
resetValue.desc: The value to reset the stat to after the rule fires.

SetRuleCanRepeat.description: Controls whether a threshold rule re-arms itself after firing. Set to true for repeating patterns like 'every 5 hits'. Set to false for one-time triggers.

canRepeat.name: Can repeat
canRepeat.desc: True to re-arm after each fire, false to fire only once.

SetStackCount.description: Sets a stat's base value to an exact number. Fires 'On stat changed' and evaluates threshold rules.

value.name: Value
value.desc: The value to set the counter to.

ClearStatBase.description: Removes the base value for a stat, reverting it to 0. Fires 'On stat changed' if the total changes.

stat.name: Stat
stat.desc: The stat name to clear the base for.

SetStatBase.display-text: Set base value of stat {0} to {1}
SetStatBase.description: Sets the starting value of a stat before any buffs are applied. For example, set the base attack to 10 so buffs add on top of that. Fires 'On stat changed' if the total changes.

stat.name: Stat
stat.desc: The stat name to set the base for.

AddTagToBuff.description: Adds a single tag to an existing buff. If the buff already has this tag nothing happens.

RemoveTagFromBuff.description: Removes a single tag from an existing buff's tag list.

ReplaceBuffTags.description: Replaces all tags on a buff at once with the new comma-separated list. Pass an empty string to remove all tags.

tags.name: Tags
tags.desc: New comma-separated tag list. Use "" to clear all tags.

AdvanceTimers.display-text: Advance all buff timers by {0} seconds
AdvanceTimers.description: Manually ticks all active timed buffs forward by the given number of seconds. Only useful when Auto-tick timers is turned off in the behavior properties.

deltaTime.name: Delta time (secs)
deltaTime.desc: Seconds to advance all timers by.

ConvertToPermanent.description: Turns a timed buff into a permanent one, cancelling its countdown. The buff will stay active until removed manually.

ConvertToTemporary.display-text: Convert buff {0} to timed with duration {1} seconds
ConvertToTemporary.description: Turns a permanent buff into a timed one. The countdown starts from zero immediately.

duration.name: Duration (secs)
duration.desc: How long the buff will last.

ResetBuffTimer.description: Restarts a timed buff's countdown from zero without changing its total duration.

buffId.name: Buff ID
buffId.desc: The buff whose timer to reset.

SetBuffDuration.display-text: Set duration of buff {0} to {1} seconds
SetBuffDuration.description: Changes how long a timed buff lasts. Does not reset the time already elapsed — the buff will expire sooner if elapsed is already high.

duration.name: Duration (secs)
duration.desc: The new total duration in seconds.

SetBuffElapsed.display-text: Set elapsed time of buff {0} to {1} seconds
SetBuffElapsed.description: Directly sets how much time has passed on a timed buff. If the value is equal to or greater than the duration, the buff expires immediately.

elapsed.name: Elapsed (secs)
elapsed.desc: Seconds to set as elapsed. Setting this to the duration or higher will expire the buff.

SetTimerPaused.description: Pauses or resumes a timed buff's countdown. While paused, the buff stays active and does not count toward expiry.

buffId.name: Buff ID
buffId.desc: The buff to pause or resume.

paused.name: Paused
paused.desc: True to pause the timer, false to resume it.

OnBuffActivated.description: Fires when a buff changes from disabled to enabled. Use LastBuffID and LastBuffStat inside this event.

OnBuffAdded.description: Fires when any buff is added to this object. Use LastBuffID, LastBuffStat, and LastBuffValue expressions inside this event to read details about the buff that was added.

OnBuffDeactivated.description: Fires when a buff changes from enabled to disabled. Use LastBuffID and LastBuffStat inside this event.

OnBuffExpired.description: Fires when a timed buff's countdown reaches zero, just before it is removed. Use LastBuffID and LastBuffStat inside this event.

OnBuffLinkAdded.description: Fires when a new buff link is registered.

OnBuffLinkFired.description: Fires whenever a buff link automatically executes its action. Use LastFiredLinkID, LastFiredLinkSourceBuff, and LastFiredLinkTargetBuff inside this event. Useful for debugging reactive chains.

OnBuffRemoved.description: Fires when any buff is removed — whether manually, by tag, by source, from a link, or because it expired. Use LastBuffID and LastBuffStat inside this event.

OnStackCleared.description: Fires once after all buffs have been removed by the 'Clear all buffs' action.

OnStatChanged.description: Fires whenever the computed total of any stat changes. Use LastChangedStat to see which stat changed and LastChangedStatTotal for its new value. You can add a sub-condition 'LastChangedStat = "attack"' to filter for a specific stat.

OnThresholdReached.description: Fires when a threshold rule executes its action. Use LastRuleID, LastRuleWatchStat, LastRuleThreshold, LastRuleTargetBuff, and LastRuleAction inside this event. Add 'LastRuleID = "my_rule"' as a sub-condition to filter for a specific rule.

OnThresholdRuleAdded.description: Fires when a new threshold rule is registered.

BuffHasTag.description: True if the specified buff exists and has the given tag.

tag.name: Tag
tag.desc: The tag to look for on the buff.

BuffSourceMatches.description: True if the specified buff exists and its source label exactly matches the given string.

HasActiveBuffOnStat.description: True if at least one enabled buff is currently targeting the given stat.

HasActiveBuffWithTag.description: True if at least one enabled buff has the given tag.

HasBuff.description: True if a buff with this ID exists, whether it is currently enabled or disabled.

buffId.name: Buff ID
buffId.desc: The buff ID to look for.

HasBuffLink.description: True if a buff link with this ID currently exists.

HasBuffOnStat.description: True if at least one buff — enabled or disabled — is targeting the given stat.

HasBuffWithSource.description: True if any buff in the stack was created by the given source.

source.name: Source
source.desc: The source label to look for.

HasBuffWithTag.description: True if at least one buff in the stack — enabled or disabled — has the given tag.

HasThresholdRule.description: True if a threshold rule with this ID currently exists.

IsBuffActive.description: True if the buff exists and is currently enabled. Disabled buffs do not contribute to stat totals.

IsBuffTemporary.description: True if the buff is a timed buff with an active countdown.

IsThresholdRuleArmed.description: True if the threshold rule exists and will fire on the next qualifying threshold crossing. Rules that have fired and are not set to repeat will return false here.

IsTimerPaused.description: True if the buff's countdown is currently paused.

StackAbove.description: True if the stat's computed total is strictly greater than the given value. A handy shortcut for checking counter thresholds in the event sheet.

statId.name: Stat / Counter
statId.desc: The stat or counter name to check.

StackBelow.description: True if the stat's computed total is strictly less than the given value.

statId.name: Stat / Counter
statId.desc: The stat or counter name to check.

StatTotalInRange.description: True if the computed total of the stat falls within the given range (inclusive on both ends).

BuffActiveState.description: Returns 1 if the buff is active, 0 if disabled, or -1 if it does not exist.

BuffDuration.description: Returns the total countdown duration in seconds of a timed buff. Returns 0 for permanent buffs.

BuffElapsedTime.description: Returns how many seconds have elapsed since the timed buff was added or last reset. Returns 0 for permanent buffs.

BuffMode.description: Returns the stacking mode of a buff: "add", "multiply", or "override". Returns an empty string if the buff does not exist.

BuffRemainingTime.description: Returns how many seconds are left before the timed buff expires (duration minus elapsed). Returns 0 for permanent buffs or buffs that do not exist.

BuffSource.description: Returns the source label of a buff (who created it). Returns an empty string if the buff has no source or does not exist.

BuffStat.description: Returns the stat name that the buff targets. Returns an empty string if the buff does not exist.

BuffValue.description: Returns the numeric modifier value of a buff. Returns 0 if the buff does not exist.

CountActiveBuffs.description: Returns the number of buffs that are currently enabled (active = true).

CountActiveBuffsByTag.description: Returns the number of active buffs that have the given tag.

CountActiveBuffsOnStat.description: Returns the number of active buffs targeting the given stat.

CountBuffs.description: Returns the total number of buffs in the stack, including disabled ones.

CountBuffsBySource.description: Returns the number of buffs whose source exactly matches the given string.

CountBuffsByTag.description: Returns the number of buffs (active or inactive) that have the given tag.

CountBuffsOnStat.description: Returns the total number of buffs (active or inactive) that target the given stat.

stat.name: Stat
stat.desc: The stat name to count buffs for.

GetBuffByIndex.description: Returns the ID of the buff at the given index (0-based) in the stack. Returns an empty string if the index is out of range. Pair with CountBuffs to loop through all buffs.

GetBuffBySourceIndex.description: Returns the buff ID at the given index among buffs matching the given source. Returns an empty string if out of range. Pair with CountBuffsBySource.

source.name: Source
source.desc: The source label to filter by.

GetBuffByTagIndex.description: Returns the ID of the buff at the given index among buffs with the specified tag. Returns an empty string if out of range. Pair with CountBuffsByTag.

GetBuffOnStatByIndex.description: Returns the ID of the buff at the given index among buffs targeting the given stat. Returns an empty string if out of range. Pair with CountBuffsOnStat.

CountLastBuffTags.description: Returns the number of tags on the buff from the most recent 'On buff added' event. Pair with GetLastBuffTagByIndex to loop through them.

GetLastBuffTagByIndex.description: Returns the tag at the given index from the most recent 'On buff added' event. Pair with CountLastBuffTags.

LastBuffID.description: Returns the ID of the buff from the most recent buff event (added, removed, expired, activated, or deactivated). Only valid inside those trigger conditions.

LastBuffMode.description: Returns the stacking mode ("add", "multiply", or "override") of the buff from the most recent 'On buff added' event.

LastBuffSource.description: Returns the source label of the buff from the most recent 'On buff added', 'On buff removed', or 'On buff expired' event. Returns an empty string if the buff had no source.

LastBuffStat.description: Returns the stat name of the buff from the most recent buff event. Only valid inside buff trigger conditions.

LastBuffValue.description: Returns the numeric modifier value of the buff from the most recent buff event. Only valid inside buff trigger conditions.

LastChangedStat.description: Returns the stat name from the most recent 'On stat changed' event. Use this to identify which stat just changed.

LastChangedStatTotal.description: Returns the new computed total of the stat from the most recent 'On stat changed' event. Use this to update a HUD display without polling.

LastFiredLinkID.description: Returns the link ID from the most recent 'On buff link fired' event.

LastFiredLinkSourceBuff.description: Returns the source buff ID from the most recent 'On buff link fired' event (the buff whose event triggered the link).

LastFiredLinkTargetBuff.description: Returns the target buff ID from the most recent 'On buff link fired' event (the buff that received the action).

LastRuleAction.description: Returns the action string ("activate", "deactivate", "remove", or "add_from_template") from the most recent 'On threshold reached' event.

LastRuleID.description: Returns the rule ID from the most recent 'On threshold reached' event.

LastRuleTargetBuff.description: Returns the target buff ID from the most recent 'On threshold reached' event.

LastRuleThreshold.description: Returns the threshold value from the most recent 'On threshold reached' event.

LastRuleWatchStat.description: Returns the watched stat name from the most recent 'On threshold reached' event.

CountArmedRules.description: Returns the number of threshold rules that are currently armed and ready to fire on the next qualifying threshold crossing.

CountBuffLinks.description: Returns the total number of registered buff links.

CountThresholdRules.description: Returns the total number of registered threshold rules.

StatAddSum.description: Returns the raw sum of all active 'Add' mode buff values on the stat, before multipliers or overrides are applied.

StatBase.description: Returns the base value of the named stat before any buffs are applied. Returns 0 if no base has been set.

StatMultiplier.description: Returns the combined multiplier for the stat: 1 + (sum of all active Multiply buff values / 100). Returns 1.0 if no multiply buffs are active (meaning no bonus).

StatTotal.description: Returns the fully computed total of the named stat: base + add buffs, then multiplied by multiply buffs, then overridden if any override buffs are active. This is the main value to use in your game logic.

CountBuffTags.description: Returns how many tags the given buff has. Returns 0 if the buff does not exist.

GetBuffTagByIndex.description: Returns the tag at the given index on the specified buff. Returns an empty string if out of range. Pair with CountBuffTags.
